description: BI-FAST unsupervised fraud detection v3 ENRICHED — enrich agg per sourceAccount + preprocessing + inference + band assignment (is_anomaly)

script.description: Copy enriched agg fields (nested {s,c,d}) ke top-level ctx (fallback ke median kalau enrich miss)
script.source: if (ctx._agg != null) { if (ctx._agg.amt_sum_2min instanceof Map && ctx._agg.amt_sum_2min.s != null) ctx.amt_sum_2min = ctx._agg.amt_sum_2min.s; if (ctx._agg.amt_sum_5min instanceof Map && ctx._agg.amt_sum_5min.s != null) ctx.amt_sum_5min = ctx._agg.amt_sum_5min.s; if (ctx._agg.amt_sum_1h instanceof Map && ctx._agg.amt_sum_1h.s != null) ctx.amt_sum_1h = ctx._agg.amt_sum_1h.s; if (ctx._agg.amt_sum_1d instanceof Map && ctx._agg.amt_sum_1d.s != null) ctx.amt_sum_1d = ctx._agg.amt_sum_1d.s; if (ctx._agg.tx_count_5min instanceof Map && ctx._agg.tx_count_5min.c != null) ctx.tx_count_5min = ctx._agg.tx_count_5min.c; if (ctx._agg.tx_count_1h instanceof Map && ctx._agg.tx_count_1h.c != null) ctx.tx_count_1h = ctx._agg.tx_count_1h.c; if (ctx._agg.distinct_device_5min instanceof Map && ctx._agg.distinct_device_5min.d != null) ctx.distinct_device_5min = ctx._agg.distinct_device_5min.d; if (ctx._agg.distinct_ip_5min instanceof Map && ctx._agg.distinct_ip_5min.d != null) ctx.distinct_ip_5min = ctx._agg.distinct_ip_5min.d; if (ctx._agg.distinct_location_5min instanceof Map && ctx._agg.distinct_location_5min.d != null) ctx.distinct_location_5min = ctx._agg.distinct_location_5min.d; }

double s = ctx.ml.outlier_score instanceof Number ? ((Number)ctx.ml.outlier_score).doubleValue() : 0.0;ctx.ml.is_anomaly = s >= params.threshold;if (s >= params.threshold_high) { ctx.ml.band = 'HIGH'; }else if (s >= params.threshold) { ctx.ml.band = 'MEDIUM'; }else { ctx.ml.band = 'LOW'; }

script.description: Cleanup intermediate features — keep only ml.* + original payload + agg fields
script.source: List drop = new ArrayList();for (String k : ctx.keySet()) {  if (k.startsWith('num__') || k.startsWith('cat__') ||      k.equals('log_amount') || k.equals('log_fee') || k.equals('fee_ratio') ||      k.equals('has_geo') || k.equals('has_device') || k.equals('has_ip') ||      k.equals('cross_bank') || k.equals('cross_country') || k.equals('_agg')) {    drop.add(k);  }}for (String k : drop) { ctx.remove(k); }
